lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: What are you playing at? I've given you a job, get it done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What am I supposed to be doing?

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: You need to recover an artefact for me. It can be found in the [location].

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: Watch yourself, if the guards catch you carrying hot goods they'll throw you in the brig.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll get to it right away, boss.

sections.title: Getting caught or losing the artefact

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the artefact...

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: Congratulations, you're a failure. Come back to me when you think you've got what it takes to get the job done.

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: This is exactly what our friends overseas were looking for. Here's your cut. Let me know when you're ready for more work.

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: Eh, what do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's your story?

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: Sea piracy just ain't what it used to be, so my crew and I have had to make do on land. We specialise in 'acquiring' valuable antiquities from around the city and shipping them to our friends overseas.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And people just let you get away with this?

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: Of course they do, for the right price. That's just how things work around here, kid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looking for any help?

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: Yeah, you look like you might be able to help me out. If you think you've got what it takes, I might have a job for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have what it takes.

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: We'll see about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure I have the time right now.

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: Perhaps some other time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be on my way.

sections.title: Talking again while holdiing the challenge scroll

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: Please give me your answer!

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: How can that be? Go check again!

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: Spot on!

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.

lines.speaker: Captain Khaled
lines.text: I've got nothing to say to you.
